form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Most recent effort finished last over 400m at this track beaten 14 lengths (23.75) behind Mr. Chives in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win on April 7. Must be included.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished last over 390m at Ballarat beaten 9 lengths (23.06) behind Aunty Cheryl in a T3 RSTW on April 6. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last outing finished last over 390m at Ballarat beaten 9 lengths (23.06) behind Aunty Cheryl in a T3 RSTW on April 6. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Ballarat over 390m in 22.46. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 390m at Ballarat at Rank Limit - Grade 7 level. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Ballarat over 390m in 22.46. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 390m at Ballarat at Rank Limit - Grade 7 level. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (22.79) at this track over 400m. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (22.79) at this track over 400m. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (23.33) over 400m at this track. Boxed awkwardly but is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (23.33) over 400m at this track. Boxed awkwardly but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 3 length fourth (23.12) over 400m at this track. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 3 length fourth (23.12) over 400m at this track. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (23.39) over 400m at this track. Boxed out wide and will need the right run to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Mix 6/7 on April 7 over 410m at Horsham behind Doongalla Mimic beaten 4 lengths (23.72). Should be right in the finish.
